overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the captain's bridge at night. The vessel departs a harbor, passing a lighthouse on the starboard side while navigating through calm waters, with navigation monitors displaying radar and chart data.

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring radar and navigation displays while departing the harbor

entered.detail: three-screen display array showing nautical chart, radar, and system status
bow of the vessel visible through the bridge windows with railing
tall white lighthouse with horizontal stripes on the starboard side
distant shoreline lights from harbor buildings
calm dark water surrounding the vessel

segments.scene_description: View from the ship's bridge at night, with three navigation monitors visible overhead. The vessel moves steadily forward through the harbor channel, approaching a lighthouse structure visible on the right side. The bow of the ship is visible through the forward windows against the dark water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge in open water transition

events.description: ship passes the lighthouse structure on the starboard side, entering more open water

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the ship through the channel, monitoring the radar display showing the vessel's progress

segments.scene_description: The ship passes the lighthouse and continues into open water. The navigation monitors remain visible overhead while the lighthouse recedes into the distance on the right. The vessel maintains steady forward motion through the calm waters.

events.description: white water wake becomes visible behind the ship as it moves through open water

agents.ego_description: maintaining course in open water, with the radar display showing clear passage ahead

entered.detail: white foamy wake trailing behind the vessel visible through the rear window

segments.scene_description: The ship continues through open water with a visible white wake trailing behind. The lighthouse and harbor lights have faded from view, leaving only the dark water and the vessel's bow visible ahead. The navigation monitors continue to display the ship's course and radar data.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the ship's bridge as the vessel departs a sheltered harbor for the solitude of the open sea at night. It begins with the ship moving steadily through a harbor channel, where three navigation monitors glow overhead and a lighthouse structure looms on the starboard side. As the vessel passes the lighthouse, the structure gradually recedes into the distance while the ship transitions from the confined channel into expansive, calm waters. The scene then shifts as the harbor lights fade completely from view, leaving only the dark water and the ship's bow visible ahead. Finally, the camera maintains its forward trajectory through the void, with the navigation monitors continuing to track the course as a white wake trails behind the ship.
